CustomField.description: If this box is checked, the rent slip start dates will always be the last day of the month, e.g. Feb 28 or 29, Mar 31, Apr 30.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If this box is checked, the Rent Slip start dates will always be the last day of the month, e.g. Feb 28 or 29, Mar 31, Apr 30.
CustomField.label: Rent Start Date Always End of Month
